headline: Stop gaining—cut 3700 kJ and row 45 minutes today
summary: You're gaining when you need -0.65 kg/week; Friday temptation arrives tomorrow—lock in discipline with zero snacks today.
details: Eat only portioned Huel and whole vegan food under 8000 kJ today; no emotional eating, no grazing. Row 45 minutes at moderate intensity on the rowing machine this afternoon. Wednesday discipline is your gateway to surviving Friday–Sunday; every weak day stacks against you.
